task_completion.description: Navigate to the Professional Specialists directory or Add Specialist form in Oscar EMR
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen in the Oscar EMR web interface showing the 'Professional Specialists' directory, 'Add Specialist', or a similar form for adding a new specialist.

task_completion.description: Enter the specialist's first and last name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Rajesh' entered in the First Name field and 'Patel' entered in the Last Name field.
The text 'Orthopedic Surgery' entered or selected in the Specialty, Service, or Title field.

task_completion.description: Enter the address, phone, fax, email, and website
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address '250 Dundas Street West, Suite 410, Mississauga, ON L5B 1J2', phone '905-555-0147', fax '905-555-0148', email 'referrals@patelortho.ca', and website 'www.patelortho.ca' entered in their respective fields.

The text 'Accepts referrals for joint replacement, sports injuries, and fracture management. Include recent imaging reports with all referrals. Average wait time 6-8 weeks.' entered in the Notes, Annotation, or Comments field.
A confirmation message indicating the specialist was successfully added, or the name 'Patel, Rajesh' appearing in the Professional Specialists directory list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oscar EMR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser displaying the Oscar EMR interface, not a text editor or a mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show GUI interactions (filling out forms, clicking buttons) rather than terminal windows executing SQL queries or scripts to insert the record.
The directory list or success message should appear as a natural part of the Oscar EMR interface, without signs of browser developer tools being used to alter the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Oscar EMR default credentials are username: oscardoc, password: oscar, PIN: 1117. The phone (905-555-0147) and fax (905-555-0148) use a fictional 555 exchange. The address (250 Dundas Street West, Mississauga, ON L5B 1J2) is a real building, but the specialist data is entirely synthetic.
